timeline.title: Check Eligibility
timeline.description: Ensure you are 18+, an Indian citizen, and ordinarily resident in the polling area.

timeline.title: Form 6 Registration
timeline.description: Apply for voter registration online via NVSP / Voter Helpline App or offline via BLO.

timeline.title: Check Electoral Roll
timeline.description: Verify your name is present in the voter list using ECI's Electoral Search portal.

timeline.title: Find Polling Booth
timeline.description: Identify your designated polling station online or via the Voter Helpline App.

timeline.title: Voting Day (EVM/VVPAT)
timeline.description: Go to the booth with valid ID. Press the blue button on the EVM against your choice and verify the printed slip in the VVPAT window for 7 seconds.

alternatives: Passbook with photograph issued by Bank/Post Office
Smart Card issued by RGI under NPR
Health Insurance Smart Card issued under the scheme of Ministry of Labour
Official identity cards issued to MPs/MLAs/MLCs
Service Identity Cards with photograph issued by Central/State Govt./PSUs
documents.note: Even if you have an EPIC card, your name MUST be in the Electoral Roll (Voter List) to cast a vote.
